metadata.description: Portable project-memory and anti-drift system — keep an AI anchored to the goal across long, wandering sessions, in any repository.

runtimeRequirements.note: Zero runtime dependencies. Pure markdown + protocols executed by the agent. Works on Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: lodestar
plugins.description: Project memory (Blueprint/Goal/State/GAP) with an always-on drift check that re-anchors the conversation on its active goal.
